executor.fallback_reason: cli-codex stalled 3 times in this session (zero output, zero file writes); fallback to cli-copilot per memory rule 'cli-codex primary + cli-copilot fallback'

convergence.rule: Stop if 2 consecutive iterations report no new P0/P1 findings

review_focus_per_iteration.iteration-1: Phase 1 relocations + agents/ rmdir + Phase 2 substring substitution coverage on canonical .opencode/
review_focus_per_iteration.iteration-2: Cross-runtime mirror parity (.claude/.codex symlinks, .gemini regenerated, agents byte-identity) + TOML structural integrity
review_focus_per_iteration.iteration-3: Spec folder structural soundness (parent + 3 children, validate.sh --strict, lean trio at parent) + path-reference completeness in active scope
review_focus_per_iteration.iteration-4: Documentation alignment (SKILL.md narrative, references/, install guide) + functional regression risk (template resolution post-reorg)
review_focus_per_iteration.iteration-5: Git history integrity (4 commits on main, no surviving branch, rename detection) + out-of-scope respect (barter/, z_archive/, specs/, changelog history)
review_focus_per_iteration.iteration-6: Hunter pass: what's missing? Adversarial sweep across all dimensions for unflagged P0/P1 issues
review_focus_per_iteration.iteration-7: Skeptic pass: what's claimed but not actually done? Cross-reference verification across spec/code boundaries
